{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Service Center Warehouse Officer",
  "description": "OPPO, founded in 2004, is one of the world&rsquo;s leading innovators in smart devices and mobile technology. With operations in over 60 countries and regions, Dedicated to delivering cutting-edge innovation, premium user experiences, and stylish designs. OPPO continues to expand its footprint with over 290,000 points of sale and 1,900 official service centers &mdash; bringing the beauty of technology closer to people every day

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Service Center Warehouse Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Inventory Management: Oversee daily stock levels, conduct physical and cycle counts, update inventory records (bin cards, ledgers), and resolve discrepancies.
	Receiving &amp; Dispatch: Supervise incoming deliveries, verify quality and quantity against orders, prepare goods for storage and shipment, and ensure accurate dispatch.
	Operations &amp; Coordination: Maintain proper warehouse layout, ensure equipment is functional, liaise with sales, logistics, and suppliers, and provide regular status reports.
	Quality &amp; Safety: Inspect goods for damage, ensure compliance with safety standards, and maintain a clean and organized warehouse.
	Staff Supervision (if applicable): Support the Warehouse Manager in supervising warehouse staff and enforcing standard operating procedures.


Required Skills &amp; Qualifications


	Minimum of a high school diploma with relevant experience in stock or warehouse management.
	Strong organizational, analytical, and problem-solving skills.
	Proficiency in computer usage, MS Office (Excel, Word), and inventory management software.
	Ability to multitask, work under pressure, and operate in a physically demanding environment.
	Good communication and teamwork skills.


Salary
N50,000 - N70,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified&nbsp;candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;cvpool2021@oppo-aed.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-07",

  },

Service Center Warehouse Officer Job at OPPO




        
    

        
        OPPO, founded in 2004, is one of the world’s leading innovators in smart devices and mobile technology. With operations in over 60 countries and regions, Dedicated to delivering cutting-edge innovation, premium user experiences, and stylish designs. OPPO continues to expand its footprint with over 290,000 points of sale and 1,900 official service centers — bringing the beauty of technology closer to people every day

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Service Center Warehouse Officer
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Inventory Management: Oversee daily stock levels, conduct physical and cycle counts, update inventory records (bin cards, ledgers), and resolve discrepancies.
	Receiving & Dispatch: Supervise incoming deliveries, verify quality and quantity against orders, prepare goods for storage and shipment, and ensure accurate dispatch.
	Operations & Coordination: Maintain proper warehouse layout, ensure equipment is functional, liaise with sales, logistics, and suppliers, and provide regular status reports.
	Quality & Safety: Inspect goods for damage, ensure compliance with safety standards, and maintain a clean and organized warehouse.
	Staff Supervision (if applicable): Support the Warehouse Manager in supervising warehouse staff and enforcing standard operating procedures.


Required Skills & Qualifications


	Minimum of a high school diploma with relevant experience in stock or warehouse management.
	Strong organizational, analytical, and problem-solving skills.
	Proficiency in computer usage, MS Office (Excel, Word), and inventory management software.
	Ability to multitask, work under pressure, and operate in a physically demanding environment.
	Good communication and teamwork skills.


Salary
N50,000 - N70,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Digital Marketing Officer",
  "description": "Retrust Microfinance Bank is part of Zylus Group International&rsquo;s expanding portfolio of subsidiaries. According to Zylus Group&rsquo;s website, Retrust is their &ldquo;Microfinance Solutions subsidiary, focused on empowering individuals, small businesses, and entrepreneurs by providing accessible financial services. The bank&rsquo;s head office address is given as Eledunmo Plaza, 35 Obafemi Awolowo Way, Ikeja, Lagos.&nbsp;&nbsp;Retrust was officially inaugurated during Zylus Group&rsquo;s 6th-anniversary celebrations around October 2024.&nbsp;The Microfinance Bank achieved a balance sheet of ?8.9 billion in under six months of operations&mdash;highlighting rapid growth

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Microfinance Banking

Job Summary


	The Digital Marketing Officer will be responsible for developing, implementing, and managing the bank&rsquo;s digital marketing strategies to increase brand awareness, customer acquisition, and product visibility across digital platforms.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement effective digital marketing strategies aligned with the bank&rsquo;s growth objectives.
	Manage the bank&rsquo;s social media platforms (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X, etc.).
	Create engaging and informative digital content to promote banking products and services.
	Monitor and analyze campaign performance using digital analytics tools.
	Design and execute email marketing campaigns to improve customer engagement.
	Optimize website and digital content for Search Engine Optimization (SEO).
	Plan and execute online advertising campaigns (Google Ads, social media ads).
	Collaborate with the marketing and product teams to promote loan products, savings accounts, and financial services.
	Manage online customer inquiries and ensure timely responses.
	Track digital marketing trends and recommend innovative marketing strategies.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree/HND in Marketing, Mass Communication, Business Administration, or related discipline.
	Minimum of 3&ndash;5 years of experience in Digital marketing, preferably within the financial services or fintech sector.
	Strong knowledge of social media marketing, SEO, SEM, and content marketing.
	Experience with digital marketing tools such as Google Analytics, Meta Business Suite, and email marketing platforms.
	Excellent content creation and communication skills.
	Ability to analyze digital marketing data and generate insights.
	Creative mindset with strong attention to detail.


Desired Competencies:


	Digital Campaign Management
	Content Development
	Social Media Strategy
	Customer Engagement
	Data Analysis and Reporting
	Brand Awareness Development.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits
	Opportunity for professional development
	Collaborative and innovative work environment
	Career growth opportunities within the banking sector.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Portfolio (if available) to:&nbsp;Michael.ugboma@retrustmfb.com&nbsp;using &quot;Application for Digital Marketing Officer&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Digital Marketing Officer Job at Retrust Microfinance Bank




        
    

        
        Retrust Microfinance Bank is part of Zylus Group International’s expanding portfolio of subsidiaries. According to Zylus Group’s website, Retrust is their “Microfinance Solutions subsidiary, focused on empowering individuals, small businesses, and entrepreneurs by providing accessible financial services. The bank’s head office address is given as Eledunmo Plaza, 35 Obafemi Awolowo Way, Ikeja, Lagos.  Retrust was officially inaugurated during Zylus Group’s 6th-anniversary celebrations around October 2024. The Microfinance Bank achieved a balance sheet of ?8.9 billion in under six months of operations—highlighting rapid growth

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Position: Digital Marketing Officer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Microfinance Banking

Job Summary


	The Digital Marketing Officer will be responsible for developing, implementing, and managing the bank’s digital marketing strategies to increase brand awareness, customer acquisition, and product visibility across digital platforms.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement effective digital marketing strategies aligned with the bank’s growth objectives.
	Manage the bank’s social media platforms (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X, etc.).
	Create engaging and informative digital content to promote banking products and services.
	Monitor and analyze campaign performance using digital analytics tools.
	Design and execute email marketing campaigns to improve customer engagement.
	Optimize website and digital content for Search Engine Optimization (SEO).
	Plan and execute online advertising campaigns (Google Ads, social media ads).
	Collaborate with the marketing and product teams to promote loan products, savings accounts, and financial services.
	Manage online customer inquiries and ensure timely responses.
	Track digital marketing trends and recommend innovative marketing strategies.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree/HND in Marketing, Mass Communication, Business Administration, or related discipline.
	Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in Digital marketing, preferably within the financial services or fintech sector.
	Strong knowledge of social media marketing, SEO, SEM, and content marketing.
	Experience with digital marketing tools such as Google Analytics, Meta Business Suite, and email marketing platforms.
	Excellent content creation and communication skills.
	Ability to analyze digital marketing data and generate insights.
	Creative mindset with strong attention to detail.


Desired Competencies:


	Digital Campaign Management
	Content Development
	Social Media Strategy
	Customer Engagement
	Data Analysis and Reporting
	Brand Awareness Development.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits
	Opportunity for professional development
	Collaborative and innovative work environment
	Career growth opportunities within the banking sector.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Portfolio (if available) to: [email protected] using "Application for Digital Marketing Officer" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",

  "description": "Grand Oak Limited (GOL) -&nbsp;We are the largest Manufacturer of Spirits and Wines, we believe our spirits should have character; an authenticity derived from where they are distilled, bottled and the philosophies of those who distil them.&nbsp;There are many attributes that describe us resolute, self-sufficient, tough, hard-working, enduring, emotional, passionate, philosophical and engaging.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Activation Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	To develop and execute brand activation strategies and promotional campaigns that enhance brand visibility nationwide, engage consumers, and drive sales growth.
	This role ensures that the brand&rsquo;s presence is effectively communicated and experienced across various marketing channels and events within the traditional culture and festivals space.


Responsibilities


	Develop and implement brand activation strategies and plans to enhance brand visibility, engage consumers, and drive sales growth within the culture and traditional festivals space.
	Oversee the planning, execution, and evaluation of promotional campaigns and events to ensure successful and impactful brand activations that meet marketing objectives within the festival and cultural space.
	Manage the budget for brand activation activities, ensuring cost-effective use of resources to optimize spending and achieve a higher return on investment for promotional activities in traditional and cultural events.
	Work closely with the sales and marketing team to align brand activation efforts with overall marketing and sales strategies, ensuring cohesive and integrated marketing efforts that support business goals.
	Manage relationships with external vendors, agencies, traditional partners, and cultural stakeholders nationwide involved in brand activation activities, advertising, and sponsorship to ensure high-quality execution and delivery of promotional campaigns.
	Track and analyze the nationwide performance of brand activation activities and prepare reports and insights for management to measure campaign effectiveness and inform future marketing strategies.


Challenges:


	Security concerns when traveling to high-risk states.
	Limited manpower or support staff.
	No weekend off due to operational demands.


Planning and Organising:


	Micro: Monthly planning for campaigns and activation strategies.


Context of the Job:
Framework and Boundaries:


	This role is accountable for delivering impactful consumer engagement, optimizing resources, and maintaining detailed performance tracking. However, significant decisions, budget allocations, and strategic changes require approval from senior management.


Job Requirements


	Minimum B.Sc. / HND in Marketing or its equivalent.
	Relevant professional certifications in marketing or brand management.
	Minimum of 5 years cognate experience.
	Experience in cultural events, festivals, or nationwide brand activation.


Key Competency Requirements:


	Strong interpersonal skills
	Strategic planning skills
	Budget management skills
	Consumer insight and market awareness
	Creativity and innovation
	Analytical skills
	Problem-solving skills
	Adaptability.


Operating Environment:


	Physical environment: Frequent travel nationwide.
	Hazards: Bad roads and exposure to security risks such as hoodlums.

Activation Manager Job at Grand Oak Limited (GOL)




        
    

        
        Grand Oak Limited (GOL) - We are the largest Manufacturer of Spirits and Wines, we believe our spirits should have character; an authenticity derived from where they are distilled, bottled and the philosophies of those who distil them. There are many attributes that describe us resolute, self-sufficient, tough, hard-working, enduring, emotional, passionate, philosophical and engaging.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Activation Manager
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	To develop and execute brand activation strategies and promotional campaigns that enhance brand visibility nationwide, engage consumers, and drive sales growth.
	This role ensures that the brand’s presence is effectively communicated and experienced across various marketing channels and events within the traditional culture and festivals space.


Responsibilities


	Develop and implement brand activation strategies and plans to enhance brand visibility, engage consumers, and drive sales growth within the culture and traditional festivals space.
	Oversee the planning, execution, and evaluation of promotional campaigns and events to ensure successful and impactful brand activations that meet marketing objectives within the festival and cultural space.
	Manage the budget for brand activation activities, ensuring cost-effective use of resources to optimize spending and achieve a higher return on investment for promotional activities in traditional and cultural events.
	Work closely with the sales and marketing team to align brand activation efforts with overall marketing and sales strategies, ensuring cohesive and integrated marketing efforts that support business goals.
	Manage relationships with external vendors, agencies, traditional partners, and cultural stakeholders nationwide involved in brand activation activities, advertising, and sponsorship to ensure high-quality execution and delivery of promotional campaigns.
	Track and analyze the nationwide performance of brand activation activities and prepare reports and insights for management to measure campaign effectiveness and inform future marketing strategies.


Challenges:


	Security concerns when traveling to high-risk states.
	Limited manpower or support staff.
	No weekend off due to operational demands.


Planning and Organising:


	Micro: Monthly planning for campaigns and activation strategies.


Context of the Job:
Framework and Boundaries:


	This role is accountable for delivering impactful consumer engagement, optimizing resources, and maintaining detailed performance tracking. However, significant decisions, budget allocations, and strategic changes require approval from senior management.


Job Requirements


	Minimum B.Sc. / HND in Marketing or its equivalent.
	Relevant professional certifications in marketing or brand management.
	Minimum of 5 years cognate experience.
	Experience in cultural events, festivals, or nationwide brand activation.


Key Competency Requirements:


	Strong interpersonal skills
	Strategic planning skills
	Budget management skills
	Consumer insight and market awareness
	Creativity and innovation
	Analytical skills
	Problem-solving skills
	Adaptability.


Operating Environment:


	Physical environment: Frequent travel nationwide.
	Hazards: Bad roads and exposure to security risks such as hoodlums.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HSE Officer",
  "description": "Fort Hermon Limited -&nbsp;We are a dynamic engineering and construction company specializing in delivering high-quality infrastructure, building, and industrial projects. With a focus on innovation, safety, and technical excellence, we provide end-to-end solutions that meet global standards and exceed client expectations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HSE Officer
Job Locations:&nbsp;Lagos, Ogun, &amp; Zamfara
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Implement and enforce site HSE policies and procedures in line with company standards and regulatory requirements.
	Conduct daily site safety inspections to identify hazards and ensure compliance with safety rules and safe work practices.
	Carry out risk assessments and job hazard analysis (JHA) for construction activities and ensure adequate control measures are implemented.
	Ensure proper use of Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) by all workers and visitors on the construction site.
	Investigate accidents, incidents, and near misses, prepare detailed reports, and recommend corrective and preventive actions.
	Conduct toolbox talks, safety inductions, and regular safety trainings for workers, subcontractors, and new employees on site.
	Monitor contractor safety performance and ensure all subcontractors comply with site safety regulations.
	Ensure proper environmental management practices, including waste disposal, pollution control, and site housekeeping.
	Maintain accurate HSE records and documentation, including incident reports, safety inspection reports, training records, and compliance documentation.
	Ensure availability and maintenance of safety equipment such as fire extinguishers, first aid kits, safety signage, and emergency response equipment.
	Coordinate emergency response procedures, including fire drills, evacuation plans, and first aid readiness.
	Advise site management on safety improvements and ensure corrective actions from safety audits are implemented promptly.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications with experience.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 / month

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;vineonyido@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position and preferred location as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only qualified candidates will be shortlisted.",

HSE Officer Job at Fort Hermon Limited




        
    

        
        Fort Hermon Limited - We are a dynamic engineering and construction company specializing in delivering high-quality infrastructure, building, and industrial projects. With a focus on innovation, safety, and technical excellence, we provide end-to-end solutions that meet global standards and exceed client expectations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HSE Officer
Job Locations: Lagos, Ogun, & Zamfara
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Implement and enforce site HSE policies and procedures in line with company standards and regulatory requirements.
	Conduct daily site safety inspections to identify hazards and ensure compliance with safety rules and safe work practices.
	Carry out risk assessments and job hazard analysis (JHA) for construction activities and ensure adequate control measures are implemented.
	Ensure proper use of Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) by all workers and visitors on the construction site.
	Investigate accidents, incidents, and near misses, prepare detailed reports, and recommend corrective and preventive actions.
	Conduct toolbox talks, safety inductions, and regular safety trainings for workers, subcontractors, and new employees on site.
	Monitor contractor safety performance and ensure all subcontractors comply with site safety regulations.
	Ensure proper environmental management practices, including waste disposal, pollution control, and site housekeeping.
	Maintain accurate HSE records and documentation, including incident reports, safety inspection reports, training records, and compliance documentation.
	Ensure availability and maintenance of safety equipment such as fire extinguishers, first aid kits, safety signage, and emergency response equipment.
	Coordinate emergency response procedures, including fire drills, evacuation plans, and first aid readiness.
	Advise site management on safety improvements and ensure corrective actions from safety audits are implemented promptly.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications with experience.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 / month

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and preferred location as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only qualified candidates will be shortlisted.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

title: Job Openings at Talent Towers
content:
Talent Towers is an Human Resource and Planning organization ensuring that our clients are provided with top quality HR consultancy services in the areas of Manpower planning, recruitment, retention strategy planning and training.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Design Assistant

Job Location:  Remote
Employment Type: Contract
Contract Duration: 3 Months

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	A luxury interior design firm is seeking a highly organised and detail-focused Design Assistant to support our team on luxury residential projects.
	This role involves assisting with design development, collaborating with CAD designers on layouts, and helping to prepare client-facing presentations and project documents.
	The ideal candidate will be thorough, resourceful, and eager to grow within a boutique interior design practice.


Key Responsibilities


	Support the design team by reviewing floorplans and working with CAD designers to ensure layouts are functional, well-balanced, and aligned with project goals.
	Contribute to the preparation of mood boards, presentations, and specification documents in line with the studio’s design process.
	Organise samples, maintain the design library, and assist with sourcing furniture, lighting, and finishes.
	Provide project support including scheduling, maintaining project files, and tracking progress against timelines.
	Assist in placing and tracking orders, handling returns where necessary, and liaising with suppliers to confirm lead times and availability.


Skills & Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with 2 years experience.
	Strong knowledge of interior design principles, particularly space planning and furniture selection.
	Proficiency with design tools (Photoshop, Canva, Indesign or similar).
	Ability to collaborate effectively with CAD designers (AutoCAD, SketchUp, etc.) even if not producing technical drawings themselves.
	Excellent attention to detail and ability to follow structured processes.
	Highly organised with strong time-management skills. Bonus Skills
	Experience in luxury residential interiors.
	Strong eye for styling and accessorising.
	Familiarity with vendor sourcing and procurement.
	Fast learner with the ability to quickly adapt to new systems and processes.


Salary
N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Only qualified candidates would be contacted.

 

2.) Project Operations Manager

Job Location: Lagos (Remote)
Contract Duration: 3 months

Job Summary


	A luxury interior design firm is seeking a highly organised and proactive Project Manager to coordinate the delivery of luxury residential projects.
	This role involves managing project timelines, coordinating communication between the design team, suppliers, and contractors, and ensuring projects progress smoothly from concept through to implementation.
	The Project Manager will oversee project schedules, track key milestones, and support the studio in maintaining clear structure and accountability across all active projects.
	The ideal candidate will be highly organised, detail oriented, and comfortable managing multiple moving parts within a boutique design practice.


Key Responsibilities


	Initiate and organise new projects
	Break projects into structured tasks and timelines
	Manage project schedules and deadlines
	Coordinate designers, vendors and contractors
	Monitor project progress and ensure deliverables are completed
	Maintain project management systems and task boards
	Prepare weekly project status reports
	Follow up with team members on outstanding tasks
	Coordinate supplier and vendor communication
	Raise purchase orders for approval


Skills & Qualifications:


	Experience in project management or operations coordination
	Proficiency in project management software (ClickUp, Asana, Trello etc.)
	Strong organisational and time management skills
	Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Highly detail oriented.


Salary
N350,000 per month. 

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

3.) Technical CAD Designer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Contract (3 months)

Job Summary


	This role involves translating design concepts into accurate technical drawings, joinery elevations, and 3D visualisations required for project implementation.
	The successful candidate will work closely with the design team to develop floor plans, technical details, and presentation renders while ensuring spatial layouts are practical and aligned with the design intent.
	The ideal candidate will be technically strong, organised, and comfortable working within a structured design process.


Key Responsibilities


	Produce 3D renders for design presentations
	Create interior elevations and technical drawings
	Prepare joinery drawings and joinery elevations
	Develop floor plans based on approved layouts
	Interpret architectural drawings and blueprints
	Support spatial coordination with the design team
	Review furniture clearances and circulation paths
	Assist with presentation visuals when required


Skills & Qualifications


	Degree in Architecture, Interior Architecture or related discipline
	Experience with luxury residential interiors
	Experience producing construction documentation
	Strong SketchUp modelling skills
	Ability to produce high quality interior renders
	Understanding of joinery detailing
	Ability to read architectural drawings
	Knowledge of space planning and furniture layouts
	Strong time management skills


Salary
N400,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
